## Description
## Related Issue
## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature (new component or story)
- [ ] Fix (bug fix)
- [ ] Update (modification of existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines (Prettier/ESLint).
- [ ] I have used only `--nds-` CSS variables (no hardcoded values).
- [ ] My changes are backward compatible.
- [ ] I have added/updated the corresponding `.stories.svelte` file.
- [ ] I have written/updated tests for my changes.
- [ ] I have verified the component in both Light and Dark modes.

---
**Note:** Non-compliant PRs will be automatically closed.
